basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Teysa as a WB aristocrats/death-trigger Commander anchor.
EDHREC, MTGGoldfish, Moxfield and Archidekt pages label Teysa Karlov as Commander deck context.
The profile models aristocrat redundancy, not lifegain-only Orzhov.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Aristocrat triangle coverage is the main reusable pattern.
Combo loops are power-lane aware and not casual defaults.

themes.name: aristocrats_death_triggers
themes.notes: Teysa doubles death triggers and converts disposable creatures into cards, damage, and board control.

themes.name: orzhov_tokens_sacrifice
themes.notes: Fodder plus free sacrifice outlets keeps the engine resilient.

themes.name: recursion_value
themes.notes: Small recursion packages rebuild after removal and enable repeatable death triggers.

examples: Soul Sisters package without sacrifice or death payoffs
avoid_patterns.reason: Teysa doubles death triggers, not generic lifegain.

examples: wide tokens with no sacrifice outlets
avoid_patterns.reason: Fodder must connect to outlets and payoffs to be a Teysa engine.

examples: deterministic loops in casual profile by default
avoid_patterns.reason: Loops are valid high-power signals but should respect user intent.
